Auto
GitHub

Layout

  • App / Page / Drawer

  • Stepper

  • Checkbox / Radio / Toggle

  • Org Chart
  • Performance Meter

  • Work Order
  • Machine Status
  • Production Line
  • Quality Check
  • Batch Tracker
  • BOM Tree
  • Gantt

System & Files

  • File Manager
  • System Monitor
UX v3.0

Employee Card

HR employee profile cards with avatar, status indicator, department badge, contact info, and action buttons.

Basic Employee Card

Preview
AM

Ana Martinez

Senior Developer Engineering
ana@erplora.com +34 600 111 222 
<div class="employee-card" style="max-width: 260px;">
  <div class="employee-card-avatar employee-card-avatar-primary">
    <span class="employee-card-status employee-card-status-available employee-card-status-pulse"></span>
    AM
  </div>
  <div class="employee-card-info">
    <h3 class="employee-card-name">Ana Martinez</h3>
    <span class="employee-card-title">Senior Developer</span>
    <span class="employee-card-department employee-card-department-engineering">Engineering</span>
  </div>
  <div class="employee-card-contact">
    <a href="mailto:ana@erplora.com" class="employee-card-contact-item">
      <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M4 4h16c1.1 0 2 .9 2 2v12c0 1.1-.9 2-2 2H4c-1.1 0-2-.9-2-2V6c0-1.1.9-2 2-2z"/><polyline points="22,6 12,13 2,6"/></svg>
      <span class="employee-card-contact-text">ana@erplora.com</span>
    </a>
    <a href="tel:+34600111222" class="employee-card-contact-item">
      <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M22 16.92v3a2 2 0 01-2.18 2 19.79 19.79 0 01-8.63-3.07 19.5 19.5 0 01-6-6 19.79 19.79 0 01-3.07-8.67A2 2 0 014.11 2h3a2 2 0 012 1.72c.127.96.361 1.903.7 2.81a2 2 0 01-.45 2.11L8.09 9.91a16 16 0 006 6l1.27-1.27a2 2 0 012.11-.45c.907.339 1.85.573 2.81.7A2 2 0 0122 16.92z"/></svg>
      <span class="employee-card-contact-text">+34 600 111 222</span>
    </a>
  </div>
  <div class="employee-card-actions">
    <button class="employee-card-action employee-card-action-call">
      <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M22 16.92v3a2 2 0 01-2.18 2 19.79 19.79 0 01-8.63-3.07 19.5 19.5 0 01-6-6 19.79 19.79 0 01-3.07-8.67A2 2 0 014.11 2h3a2 2 0 012 1.72c.127.96.361 1.903.7 2.81a2 2 0 01-.45 2.11L8.09 9.91a16 16 0 006 6l1.27-1.27a2 2 0 012.11-.45c.907.339 1.85.573 2.81.7A2 2 0 0122 16.92z"/></svg>
    </button>
    <button class="employee-card-action employee-card-action-email">
      <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M4 4h16c1.1 0 2 .9 2 2v12c0 1.1-.9 2-2 2H4c-1.1 0-2-.9-2-2V6c0-1.1.9-2 2-2z"/><polyline points="22,6 12,13 2,6"/></svg>
    </button>
    <button class="employee-card-action employee-card-action-chat">
      <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M21 15a2 2 0 01-2 2H7l-4 4V5a2 2 0 012-2h14a2 2 0 012 2z"/></svg>
    </button>
  </div>
</div>

Requires: ux.min.css

<div class="flex flex-col items-center text-center gap-2 p-4 bg-base-100 border border-base-300 rounded-box max-w-65 hover:shadow-md transition">
  <div class="relative w-16 h-16 rounded-full bg-primary text-primary-content flex items-center justify-center font-semibold text-xl uppercase shrink-0">
    AM
    <span class="absolute bottom-0.5 right-0.5 w-3.5 h-3.5 rounded-full bg-success border-2 border-base-100 animate-pulse"></span>
  </div>
  <div class="flex flex-col min-w-0 w-full gap-0.5">
    <h3 class="font-semibold text-base truncate m-0">Ana Martinez</h3>
    <span class="text-sm text-base-content/60 truncate">Senior Developer</span>
    <span class="inline-flex items-center justify-center text-xs font-medium px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full mt-1 bg-info/10 text-info self-center">Engineering</span>
  </div>
  <div class="flex flex-col w-full gap-1 mt-1 pt-2 border-t border-base-300">
    <a href="#" class="flex items-center gap-1 text-sm text-base-content/60 no-underline hover:text-primary">
      <svg class="w-4 h-4 shrink-0 opacity-70" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M4 4h16c1.1 0 2 .9 2 2v12c0 1.1-.9 2-2 2H4c-1.1 0-2-.9-2-2V6c0-1.1.9-2 2-2z"/><polyline points="22,6 12,13 2,6"/></svg>
      <span class="truncate">ana@erplora.com</span>
    </a>
  </div>
  <div class="flex justify-center gap-1 mt-2">
    <button class="w-9 h-9 rounded-full border border-base-300 bg-base-100 text-base-content/60 flex items-center justify-center hover:bg-success hover:border-success hover:text-white transition">Ph</button>
    <button class="w-9 h-9 rounded-full border border-base-300 bg-base-100 text-base-content/60 flex items-center justify-center hover:bg-primary hover:border-primary hover:text-white transition">Em</button>
    <button class="w-9 h-9 rounded-full border border-base-300 bg-base-100 text-base-content/60 flex items-center justify-center hover:bg-accent hover:border-accent hover:text-white transition">Ch</button>
  </div>
</div>

Requires: tw.min.css

// Toggle card selection
document.querySelectorAll('.employee-card-clickable').forEach(card => {
  card.addEventListener('click', () => {
    card.classList.toggle('employee-card-selected');
  });
});

Horizontal Variant

Preview
CR

Carlos Ruiz

Product Designer Design
carlos@erplora.com +34 600 333 444 
<div class="employee-card employee-card-horizontal" style="max-width: 420px;">
  <div class="employee-card-avatar employee-card-avatar-accent">
    <span class="employee-card-status employee-card-status-busy"></span>
    CR
  </div>
  <div class="employee-card-info">
    <h3 class="employee-card-name">Carlos Ruiz</h3>
    <span class="employee-card-title">Product Designer</span>
    <span class="employee-card-department employee-card-department-design">Design</span>
    <div class="employee-card-contact">
      <a href="mailto:carlos@erplora.com" class="employee-card-contact-item">
        <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M4 4h16c1.1 0 2 .9 2 2v12c0 1.1-.9 2-2 2H4c-1.1 0-2-.9-2-2V6c0-1.1.9-2 2-2z"/><polyline points="22,6 12,13 2,6"/></svg>
        <span class="employee-card-contact-text">carlos@erplora.com</span>
      </a>
      <a href="tel:+34600333444" class="employee-card-contact-item">
        <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M22 16.92v3a2 2 0 01-2.18 2 19.79 19.79 0 01-8.63-3.07 19.5 19.5 0 01-6-6 19.79 19.79 0 01-3.07-8.67A2 2 0 014.11 2h3a2 2 0 012 1.72c.127.96.361 1.903.7 2.81a2 2 0 01-.45 2.11L8.09 9.91a16 16 0 006 6l1.27-1.27a2 2 0 012.11-.45c.907.339 1.85.573 2.81.7A2 2 0 0122 16.92z"/></svg>
        <span class="employee-card-contact-text">+34 600 333 444</span>
      </a>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="employee-card-actions">
    <button class="employee-card-action employee-card-action-call">
      <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M22 16.92v3a2 2 0 01-2.18 2 19.79 19.79 0 01-8.63-3.07 19.5 19.5 0 01-6-6 19.79 19.79 0 01-3.07-8.67A2 2 0 014.11 2h3a2 2 0 012 1.72c.127.96.361 1.903.7 2.81a2 2 0 01-.45 2.11L8.09 9.91a16 16 0 006 6l1.27-1.27a2 2 0 012.11-.45c.907.339 1.85.573 2.81.7A2 2 0 0122 16.92z"/></svg>
    </button>
    <button class="employee-card-action employee-card-action-email">
      <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M4 4h16c1.1 0 2 .9 2 2v12c0 1.1-.9 2-2 2H4c-1.1 0-2-.9-2-2V6c0-1.1.9-2 2-2z"/><polyline points="22,6 12,13 2,6"/></svg>
    </button>
  </div>
</div>

Requires: ux.min.css

<div class="flex flex-row items-start gap-2 p-4 bg-base-100 border border-base-300 rounded-box max-w-md hover:shadow-md transition">
  <div class="relative w-16 h-16 rounded-full bg-accent text-accent-content flex items-center justify-center font-semibold text-xl uppercase shrink-0">
    CR
    <span class="absolute bottom-0.5 right-0.5 w-3.5 h-3.5 rounded-full bg-error border-2 border-base-100"></span>
  </div>
  <div class="flex-1 min-w-0 flex flex-col gap-0.5">
    <h3 class="font-semibold text-base truncate m-0">Carlos Ruiz</h3>
    <span class="text-sm text-base-content/60 truncate">Product Designer</span>
    <span class="inline-flex items-center text-xs font-medium px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full mt-1 bg-purple-100 text-purple-700 self-start">Design</span>
    <div class="flex flex-row flex-wrap gap-1 mt-2">
      <a href="#" class="flex items-center gap-1 text-sm text-base-content/60 no-underline hover:text-primary">carlos@erplora.com</a>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="flex flex-col gap-1 ml-4">
    <button class="w-9 h-9 rounded-full border border-base-300 bg-base-100 text-base-content/60 flex items-center justify-center hover:bg-success hover:border-success hover:text-white transition">Ph</button>
    <button class="w-9 h-9 rounded-full border border-base-300 bg-base-100 text-base-content/60 flex items-center justify-center hover:bg-primary hover:border-primary hover:text-white transition">Em</button>
  </div>
</div>

Requires: tw.min.css

// No JS needed — horizontal is a CSS-only layout variant

Employee Grid

Preview
AM

Ana Martinez

Senior Developer Engineering
CR

Carlos Ruiz

Product Designer Design
LG

Laura Garcia

Sales Manager Sales
PL

Pedro Lopez

HR Specialist HR
MF

Maria Fernandez

Financial Analyst Finance
JS

Juan Sanchez

Marketing Lead Marketing 
<div class="employee-grid employee-grid-3">
  <div class="employee-card employee-card-clickable">
    <div class="employee-card-avatar employee-card-avatar-primary">
      <span class="employee-card-status employee-card-status-available employee-card-status-pulse"></span>
      AM
    </div>
    <div class="employee-card-info">
      <h3 class="employee-card-name">Ana Martinez</h3>
      <span class="employee-card-title">Senior Developer</span>
      <span class="employee-card-department employee-card-department-engineering">Engineering</span>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="employee-card employee-card-clickable">
    <div class="employee-card-avatar employee-card-avatar-accent">
      <span class="employee-card-status employee-card-status-busy"></span>
      CR
    </div>
    <div class="employee-card-info">
      <h3 class="employee-card-name">Carlos Ruiz</h3>
      <span class="employee-card-title">Product Designer</span>
      <span class="employee-card-department employee-card-department-design">Design</span>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="employee-card employee-card-clickable employee-card-selected">
    <div class="employee-card-avatar employee-card-avatar-success">
      <span class="employee-card-status employee-card-status-away"></span>
      LG
    </div>
    <div class="employee-card-info">
      <h3 class="employee-card-name">Laura Garcia</h3>
      <span class="employee-card-title">Sales Manager</span>
      <span class="employee-card-department employee-card-department-sales">Sales</span>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="employee-card employee-card-clickable">
    <div class="employee-card-avatar employee-card-avatar-warning">
      <span class="employee-card-status employee-card-status-offline"></span>
      PL
    </div>
    <div class="employee-card-info">
      <h3 class="employee-card-name">Pedro Lopez</h3>
      <span class="employee-card-title">HR Specialist</span>
      <span class="employee-card-department employee-card-department-hr">HR</span>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="employee-card employee-card-clickable">
    <div class="employee-card-avatar employee-card-avatar-secondary">
      <span class="employee-card-status employee-card-status-available"></span>
      MF
    </div>
    <div class="employee-card-info">
      <h3 class="employee-card-name">Maria Fernandez</h3>
      <span class="employee-card-title">Financial Analyst</span>
      <span class="employee-card-department employee-card-department-finance">Finance</span>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="employee-card employee-card-clickable">
    <div class="employee-card-avatar employee-card-avatar-error">
      <span class="employee-card-status employee-card-status-available employee-card-status-pulse"></span>
      JS
    </div>
    <div class="employee-card-info">
      <h3 class="employee-card-name">Juan Sanchez</h3>
      <span class="employee-card-title">Marketing Lead</span>
      <span class="employee-card-department employee-card-department-marketing">Marketing</span>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

Requires: ux.min.css

<div class="grid grid-cols-3 gap-4">
  <!-- Repeat card structure for each employee -->
  <div class="flex flex-col items-center text-center gap-2 p-4 bg-base-100 border border-base-300 rounded-box cursor-pointer hover:shadow-md hover:border-primary transition">
    <div class="relative w-16 h-16 rounded-full bg-primary text-primary-content flex items-center justify-center font-semibold text-xl">AM</div>
    <h3 class="font-semibold text-base m-0">Ana Martinez</h3>
    <span class="text-sm text-base-content/60">Senior Developer</span>
    <span class="text-xs font-medium px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full bg-info/10 text-info">Engineering</span>
  </div>
  <!-- ... more cards ... -->
</div>

Requires: tw.min.css

// Toggle selection on clickable cards
document.querySelectorAll('.employee-card-clickable').forEach(card => {
  card.addEventListener('click', () => {
    card.classList.toggle('employee-card-selected');
  });
});

Glass Variant

Preview
AM

Ana Martinez

Senior Developer Engineering
ana@erplora.com 
<div style="background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%); padding: 2rem; border-radius: 0.75rem;">
  <div class="employee-card glass" style="max-width: 260px; margin: 0 auto;">
    <div class="employee-card-avatar employee-card-avatar-primary">
      <span class="employee-card-status employee-card-status-available employee-card-status-pulse"></span>
      AM
    </div>
    <div class="employee-card-info">
      <h3 class="employee-card-name">Ana Martinez</h3>
      <span class="employee-card-title">Senior Developer</span>
      <span class="employee-card-department employee-card-department-engineering">Engineering</span>
    </div>
    <div class="employee-card-contact">
      <a href="mailto:ana@erplora.com" class="employee-card-contact-item">
        <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M4 4h16c1.1 0 2 .9 2 2v12c0 1.1-.9 2-2 2H4c-1.1 0-2-.9-2-2V6c0-1.1.9-2 2-2z"/><polyline points="22,6 12,13 2,6"/></svg>
        <span class="employee-card-contact-text">ana@erplora.com</span>
      </a>
    </div>
    <div class="employee-card-actions">
      <button class="employee-card-action employee-card-action-call">
        <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M22 16.92v3a2 2 0 01-2.18 2 19.79 19.79 0 01-8.63-3.07 19.5 19.5 0 01-6-6 19.79 19.79 0 01-3.07-8.67A2 2 0 014.11 2h3a2 2 0 012 1.72c.127.96.361 1.903.7 2.81a2 2 0 01-.45 2.11L8.09 9.91a16 16 0 006 6l1.27-1.27a2 2 0 012.11-.45c.907.339 1.85.573 2.81.7A2 2 0 0122 16.92z"/></svg>
      </button>
      <button class="employee-card-action employee-card-action-email">
        <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M4 4h16c1.1 0 2 .9 2 2v12c0 1.1-.9 2-2 2H4c-1.1 0-2-.9-2-2V6c0-1.1.9-2 2-2z"/><polyline points="22,6 12,13 2,6"/></svg>
      </button>
      <button class="employee-card-action employee-card-action-chat">
        <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M21 15a2 2 0 01-2 2H7l-4 4V5a2 2 0 012-2h14a2 2 0 012 2z"/></svg>
      </button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

Requires: ux.min.css

<div style="background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%); padding: 2rem; border-radius: 0.75rem;">
  <div class="glass rounded-box flex flex-col items-center text-center gap-3 p-6" style="max-width: 260px; margin: 0 auto;">
    <div class="relative w-16 h-16 rounded-full bg-primary text-primary-content flex items-center justify-center font-semibold text-xl">
      <span class="absolute bottom-0 right-0 w-3.5 h-3.5 rounded-full bg-success border-2 border-white animate-pulse"></span>
      AM
    </div>
    <div class="flex flex-col items-center gap-1">
      <h3 class="font-semibold text-base text-white m-0">Ana Martinez</h3>
      <span class="text-sm text-white/70">Senior Developer</span>
      <span class="text-xs font-medium px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full bg-info/15 text-info">Engineering</span>
    </div>
    <div class="w-full pt-3 border-t" style="border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.15);">
      <a href="#" class="flex items-center gap-2 text-sm text-white/80 no-underline hover:text-white">
        <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" class="size-4" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M4 4h16c1.1 0 2 .9 2 2v12c0 1.1-.9 2-2 2H4c-1.1 0-2-.9-2-2V6c0-1.1.9-2 2-2z"/><polyline points="22,6 12,13 2,6"/></svg>
        ana@erplora.com
      </a>
    </div>
    <div class="flex gap-2">
      <button class="w-9 h-9 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-white/80 hover:text-success hover:bg-white/10 transition"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" class="size-4" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M22 16.92v3a2 2 0 01-2.18 2 19.79 19.79 0 01-8.63-3.07 19.5 19.5 0 01-6-6 19.79 19.79 0 01-3.07-8.67A2 2 0 014.11 2h3a2 2 0 012 1.72c.127.96.361 1.903.7 2.81a2 2 0 01-.45 2.11L8.09 9.91a16 16 0 006 6l1.27-1.27a2 2 0 012.11-.45c.907.339 1.85.573 2.81.7A2 2 0 0122 16.92z"/></svg></button>
      <button class="w-9 h-9 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-white/80 hover:text-primary hover:bg-white/10 transition"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" class="size-4" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M4 4h16c1.1 0 2 .9 2 2v12c0 1.1-.9 2-2 2H4c-1.1 0-2-.9-2-2V6c0-1.1.9-2 2-2z"/><polyline points="22,6 12,13 2,6"/></svg></button>
      <button class="w-9 h-9 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-white/80 hover:text-accent hover:bg-white/10 transition"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" class="size-4" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M21 15a2 2 0 01-2 2H7l-4 4V5a2 2 0 012-2h14a2 2 0 012 2z"/></svg></button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

Requires: tw.min.css

// No JS needed — glass is a CSS-only variant

Classes Reference

Class Description
.employee-cardBase card container (vertical, centered)
.employee-card-horizontalHorizontal layout variant
.employee-card-compactCompact row variant with smaller avatar
.employee-card-clickableAdds hover border and pointer cursor
.employee-card-selectedSelected state with primary ring
.employee-card.glassGlass morphism variant
.employee-card-avatarAvatar circle with initials or image
.employee-card-avatar-{color}Avatar color: primary, secondary, accent, success, warning, error
.employee-card-statusStatus indicator dot (inside avatar)
.employee-card-status-availableGreen available/online status
.employee-card-status-busyRed busy/DND status
.employee-card-status-awayYellow away/idle status
.employee-card-status-offlineGray offline status
.employee-card-status-pulsePulsing animation on status dot
.employee-card-infoContainer for name, title, department
.employee-card-nameEmployee name text
.employee-card-titleJob title text
.employee-card-departmentDepartment badge pill
.employee-card-department-{dept}Department color: engineering, design, marketing, sales, hr, finance, operations, support
.employee-card-contactContact info section with top border
.employee-card-contact-itemIndividual contact link (email, phone)
.employee-card-actionsAction buttons container
.employee-card-actionCircular action button
.employee-card-action-callCall action (green hover)
.employee-card-action-emailEmail action (primary hover)
.employee-card-action-chatChat action (accent hover)
.employee-gridAuto-fill responsive grid container
.employee-grid-{n}Fixed column grid: 2, 3, 4, 5
.employee-grid-compactReduced grid gap
.employee-listVertical list container for compact cards
